transcript: Speaker A: दो कप चाय का कितना हुआ? [How much for two cups of tea?] Speaker B: That would be 24 rupees, since each cup of tea is 12 rupees. Speaker A: अच्छा, UPI लेते हो आप? [Oh, do you accept UPI?] Speaker B: Yeah sure, you can pay using UPI. Speaker A: तुम्हारी इंग्लिश तो बहुत अच्छी है। यूट्यूब देख के सीखी क्या? [Your English is very good. Did you learn it by watching YouTube?] Speaker B: नहीं, इंग्लिश सीखने के लिए प्रैक्टिस करनी होती है। यूट्यूब पे प्रैक्टिस कैसे करूँगा? [No, to learn English you need to practice. How will I practice on YouTube?] Speaker A: हाँ, बात तो सही है। फिर कहाँ से सीखी? [Yes, that's true. Then where did you learn it from?] Speaker B: एक ऐप है MySivi करके। उसमें एक AI टीचर है जिसके साथ मैं प्रैक्टिस करके इंग्लिश सीखता हूँ। [There is an app called MySivi. It has an AI teacher with whom I practice and learn English.] Speaker A: पर ये ऐप तो महँगा होगा ना? [But this app must be expensive, right?] Speaker B: बिल्कुल नहीं। मैंने बस ₹1 में शुरू किया था। एंड सबसे बेस्ट पार्ट है कि यहाँ अगर ख़राब इंग्लिश बोलो तो कोई जज नहीं करता। [Not at all. I started for just ₹1. And the best part is that if you speak bad English here, nobody judges you.] Speaker A: अरे वाह! फिर तो सब लोगों को ये ऐप यूज़ करना चाहिए। [Oh wow! Then everyone should use this app.] Speaker B: बिल्कुल, आप भी अभी इंस्टॉल करो। [Absolutely, you should also install it now.] Voiceover: Install now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: 2 CUP, THAT WOULD BE 24 RUPEES, SINCE EACH CUP OF TEA IS 12 RUPEES, YEAH SURE, YOU CAN PAY USING UPI, MySivi, Arya AI Teacher, Practice Now, Fluency Score, Your Learning Path, Talk about anything, Daily routine, Let's Improve Vocabulary, Talk about your childhood, Seasons and weather, Family and Relationships, Hobbies and interests, MySivi Premium, LIMITED TIME OFFER, 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1, Autopay, cancel anytime, 1,200 learners purchased today, 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access, MySivi English speaking app, Install Now
summary: A train passenger is impressed by a tea seller's fluent English. The seller explains he practices with an AI teacher on the MySivi app, which offers judgment-free learning. He highlights a promotional offer of 3 days of premium access for just ₹1 and urges viewers to install the app.
